Agent Call Request

4 minutes ago

Agent Call Request
58 messages

Call me with my agent

I can do that. First I need to know what number to call you at (E.164 format, e.g. +14155550123). What number should I dial?

i want ti create a webste for my firm

Got it — I can help you plan the website (and if you want, we can also add a Vapi voice/chat widget to it).

What type of firm is it (e.g., law, accounting, consulting, marketing)?

my firm is a rooftop solar vendor ,we pesonlly install solar system for consumer

Perfect — for a rooftop solar installer, the website should focus on lead capture and trust (reviews, warranties, financing, before/after installs).

What’s the name of your company?

Goyal engineering company

What city/region do you serve (e.g., “Delhi NCR”, “Ahmedabad”, “Phoenix metro”)?

newai city[ tonk district]

What’s the main action you want visitors to take: call you, WhatsApp you, or request a quote form?

call as well as whatsapp

Great — we’ll design the site around Call Now + WhatsApp everywhere (header, hero, sticky buttons).

What’s your phone number (with country code, e.g. +91...) you want to show on the site?

frst of tell me what your visit do

I don’t “visit” sites like a human, but I can help you build and launch your website plan and content here, and if you use Vapi I can also create a voice agent that answers calls/leads and connect it to:

  • a website widget (chat/voice button), and/or
  • a phone number people can call

To tailor it correctly for Goyal Engineering Company, I need your business phone number to put on the site and for the call/WhatsApp buttons. What number should we use (with country code, e.g. +91...)?

9783966514

Thanks. For the website buttons we should format it as E.164: +919783966514 (India).

Do you want the website in Hindi, English, or both?

both

Great — bilingual site.

What’s your WhatsApp number for inquiries—same as 9783966514, or different?

same

What’s your email address you want shown on the website (for quote requests)?

no ,there is no need of email addres

Understood — we’ll skip email and focus on Call/WhatsApp + a simple form if you want later.

What services do you want listed (pick the ones you offer): residential rooftop solar, on-grid, off-grid, hybrid, solar water heater, solar pump, maintenance/AMC?

on grid solar

What’s the typical system sizes you install (e.g., 3kW, 5kW, 10kW)?

all

What’s your customer promise for the hero section—do you want to emphasize lower electricity bills, government subsidy help, or fast installation?

all

What price range do you want to mention on the site (or should we say “Get quote” with no pricing)?

i dont know the correct prices , can we add this feature after

Yes — we’ll launch with “Get a free quote” and add pricing later.

Do you already have a domain name (like goyalengineering.in), or should we use a temporary name for now?

yes it is domain

What is the domain name?

goyal engineering company

Domain names can’t contain spaces. What’s the exact domain you own (for example: goyalengineeringcompany.com or goyalengineering.in)?

yes you also may this

What exact domain did you purchase (copy/paste it here)?

goyalengineering.in

Perfect.

Do you want the website to include a solar savings calculator (basic estimate based on monthly bill), or keep it simple for v1?

yes

What currency should the calculator use — INR (₹)?

yes

What average electricity unit rate should we assume for the estimate (₹ per kWh)? If you’re not sure, I can set a default like ₹8/unit. What should we use?

yes

Use ₹8/unit as the default.

Do you want to capture the lead in the calculator with name + phone, or just show the estimate with Call/WhatsApp to confirm?

i dont understand

Two options for the calculator:

  1. Estimate only: visitor enters their monthly bill → sees an estimated system size/savings → buttons Call / WhatsApp you.
  2. Estimate + lead form: after showing the estimate, it asks for name + phone so you get their details.

Which option do you want: 1 or 2?

1

Great.

Do you have your logo already, or should I design the site using a clean text logo for now?

u may desing

What brand color do you prefer for the website: green, blue, or orange?

20% green and 80% blue

Got it.

Do you want the site to show your address in Newai City (for trust), or keep it off the site?

yes

What’s the exact address text you want displayed (as you’d like it to appear on the website)?

shivaji park road ,newai

Perfect.

Do you want a contact form on the website (name + phone + message), or only Call/WhatsApp buttons?

what is contact form

A contact form is a small box on your website where visitors can type:

  • Name
  • Phone number
  • Message (like “I want solar for my home”)

Then it sends you the enquiry (or saves it).

Do you want this form on the Contact page, Yes or No?

no consumer can direct call and whatsapp

Done — no contact form, only Call and WhatsApp.

At this point, the only thing left is: are you building this site on WordPress, Shopify, or a custom/other website builder?

shopify

Shopify works, but it’s mainly for ecommerce; for a service website like yours we can still do it using Pages + a Theme.

To set it up correctly, what is your Shopify store admin URL (the part like yourstore.myshopify.com)?

i dont have any shopify accont

Shopify requires an account/store first.

Do you want me to build this as a normal business website without Shopify (recommended), or do you want to create a Shopify account anyway?

normal ,becuse i mainly focus on my locality

Great — we’ll do a normal website (best fit for a local solar company).

Which platform do you want it on: WordPress or a simple one‑page HTML website?

my goal is to create a scanner of this website ,where people scan it and drectly enter in website

That’s straightforward: you need a QR code that opens your website when someone scans it.

What is the exact website link (URL) you want the QR code to open (for example https://goyalengineering.in)?

yes

you can use this

  • “Scan to visit Goyal Engineering Company”

https://api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code/?size=1200x1200&data=https%3A%2F%2Fgoyalengineering.in%2F

Do you want the A4 sheet to be QR only or QR + your name/phone/address under it?

only qr

Here’s your QR-only (A4 print) link — it opens https://goyalengineering.in/

Download/print QR (high quality):
https://api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code/?size=2000x2000&data=https%3A%2F%2Fgoyalengineering.in%2F

If you want it in a specific format for printing, which do you prefer: PNG or SVG?

this site is not running

That makes sense: the QR works, but your website URL must be live for it to open.

Quick check

  1. Do you already own the domain goyalengineering.in? Yes or No

yes

Good — domain is owned. Next, it’s not “running” because it likely isn’t pointed to any live hosting yet.

One thing I need to check

Who is your domain purchased from (where you manage DNS)? GoDaddy, Hostinger, Namecheap, or something else?

you made things more complex . you only create a webste , i generate its scanner my self

I can’t directly publish a website to your domain from here without your hosting/DNS details, but I can give you the complete website (Hindi default + English pages) as ready-to-use HTML that you (or any local developer) can upload to hosting, and then you can generate the QR yourself.

Tell me where you want the website hosted:

  • Blogger
  • Google Sites
  • Hostinger / any web hosting (cPanel)
  • Other (tell me name)

google sites

Google Sites is simplest. I’ll keep this minimal.

Do this to get your website live on Google Sites (Hindi default)

  1. Go to sites.google.com → Blank site
  2. Site name: Goyal Engineering Company
  3. Create pages (Hindi):
    • होम
    • ऑन‑ग्रिड सोलर
    • कैलकुलेटर
    • हमारे बारे में
    • संपर्क
  4. Click Publish → choose a web address (example: goyalengineeringcompany)
  5. After publish, share me the published site link (it will look like https://sites.google.com/view/...)

Then we connect your domain:

  • Google Sites → Settings (gear) → Custom domains → add goyalengineering.in
  • Google will show you a DNS record (CNAME/TXT) to add where your domain is hosted

Which domain provider is your goyalengineering.in on (GoDaddy/Hostinger/etc.)?

google asked for fee charges, is there another way of creating a website ,whether it is not necessary that it is published on google

Google Sites charges only if you want to use a custom domain like goyalengineering.in. If you publish on the free Sites address (sites.google.com/view/...) it’s free.

If you want a free website + free custom domain connection, the easiest option is Cloudflare Pages (or GitHub Pages). It will publish your site and connect goyalengineering.in without paying Google.

Which do you prefer: Cloudflare Pages or GitHub Pages?

github pages

Great—GitHub Pages will work and you can connect goyalengineering.in for free.

1) Create the website on GitHub Pages (no coding needed beyond copy/paste)

  1. Create a GitHub account (if you don’t have one).
  2. Create a new repository named goyalengineering (public).
  3. In that repo, click Add file → Create new file.
  4. Create a file named index.html and paste the site code (I’ll give it next).
  5. Create a folder en and inside it create index.html for English.
  6. Go to Settings → Pages
    • Source: Deploy from a branch
    • Branch: main / root
  7. Your site will become live at something like:
    https://<your-username>.github.io/goyalengineering/

2) Connect your domain goyalengineering.in

In Settings → Pages → Custom domain, enter goyalengineering.in.
GitHub will tell you what DNS records to add at your domain provider.

Before I generate the exact HTML for you, which look do you want:

  • Option 1: Simple clean (white background)

  <style>
    :root{
      --green:#0b7a3b;
      --green2:#10a34a;
      --yellow:#f7c948;
      --dark:#0f172a;
      --muted:#475569;
      --bg:#f8fafc;
      --card:#ffffff;
      --border:#e2e8f0;
    }
    *{box-sizing:border-box}
    body{margin:0;font-family:system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Arial,sans-serif;color:var(--dark);background:var(--bg)}
    a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none}
    .wrap{max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;padding:20px}
    header{
      position:sticky;top:0;background:rgba(248,250,252,.9);
      backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
      border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); z-index:10;
    }
